title: nlink-lab apply --check / --dry-run --json output (v2)
description: Typed v2 envelope emitted by `nlink-lab apply --check --json` and `apply --dry-run --json` starting in nlink-lab >= 0.6.0. Replaces the v1 envelope (kept alongside as `layered-diff.schema.json` during the deprecation window). v2 adds typed per-namespace diffs at `.network.<node>` (upstream `nlink::ConfigDiff` under `nlink/serde`) and `.nftables.<node>` (upstream `nlink::NftablesDiff`). The v1 fields `.diff` (alias of `.topology`) and `.layered_summary` (formatted `Display` output) are retained for one release as a deprecation period; both will be removed in schema v3. The presence of `"layered_summary_deprecated": true` marks the deprecation window. Plan 159d.

schema_version.description: Schema version marker. v1 omitted this field entirely; v2 sets it to 2; v3 will set it to 3 and drop the deprecated mirror fields.

lab.description: Lab name (matches `desired.lab.name` in the parsed topology).

no_op.description: True when `LayeredDiff::is_empty()` is true â€” every subdiff reports zero changes across topology + per-namespace network + per-namespace nftables. `apply --check` exits 0 iff `no_op == true`.

topology.description: Lab-graph layer: node/link adds and removes, sysctls, route changes, network impairments, rate limits, and nftables_changed (a coarse 'something in nftables changed' marker; the per-rule typed view lives in `.nftables.<node>`).

network.description: Per-namespace upstream `ConfigDiff` (links + addresses + routes + qdiscs) keyed by node name. Empty map elided. Sub-shape owned by upstream nlink; consumers should use defensive defaults like `.links_to_add // []` to survive future field additions.

nftables.description: Per-namespace upstream `NftablesDiff` (tables + chains + rules + sets + elements) keyed by node name. Empty map elided. Same forward-compat caveat as `network`.

diff.description: DEPRECATED â€” v1 mirror of `topology`. Identical shape; kept for one release while downstream consumers migrate. Removed in v3.

layered_summary.description: DEPRECATED â€” human-readable `LayeredDiff::Display` rendering. Migrate to the typed `topology`/`network`/`nftables` fields and consume them through `jq` directly. Removed in v3.

layered_summary_deprecated.description: Marker â€” flips to false (or the field disappears) when the v3 schema lands and the deprecated mirror fields are removed.

TopologyDiff.description: Lab-graph diff (nodes + links + sysctls + routes + impairments + rate-limits + per-node nftables markers). Field shape is owned by nlink-lab and stable across the deprecation window.

nodes_added.description: Node names declared in `desired` but missing from the running lab.

nodes_removed.description: Node names in the running lab but absent from `desired`.

links_added.description: Lab-graph link entries to be added (carries `endpoints` + optional `addresses`/`mtu`).

nftables_changed.description: Coarse markers indicating which nodes have ANY nftables change. The per-rule typed view lives in `.nftables.<node>`.

ConfigDiff.description: Upstream `nlink::netlink::config::ConfigDiff` serialized via the `nlink/serde` feature. Sub-fields use kebab-case per upstream serde rename. See https://docs.rs/nlink/0.19/nlink/netlink/config/struct.ConfigDiff.html for the authoritative shape.

NftablesDiff.description: Upstream `nlink::netlink::nftables::config::NftablesDiff` serialized via the `nlink/serde` feature. Same forward-compat caveat as `ConfigDiff` above.
